Commencement Speakers

List of historical commencement speakers and addresses.

2026 — Mike Tirico — NBC sports broadcaster

2025 — Carmelo Anthony — NBA All-Star

2024 — Dario Nardella — Mayor of Florence

2023 — Donna Shalala — Former US Secretary HHS

2022 — David Muir — ABC World News Tonight Anchor

2021 — No official commencement speaker.

2020 — Kathy Hochul — Governor of New York

2019 — Mary C. Daly — Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco

2018 — Kathrine Switzer — Athlete and Author

2017 — Vernon E. Jordan Jr. — Civil Rights Activist

2016 — Donald Newhouse — Advance Publications

2015 — Mary Karr — Author and Professor

2014 — David Remnick — Editor of The New Yorker

2013 — Nicholas Kristof — NYT Columnist

2012 — Aaron Sorkin — Screenwriter

2011 — J. Craig Venter — Scientist

2010 — Jamie Dimon — JPMorgan Chase CEO

2009 — Joseph R. Biden Jr. — 47th Vice President

2008 — Bob Woodruff — ABC News Journalist

2007 — Frank McCourt — Pulitzer Prize Author
